Designed for the ultimate Y2K trendsetter, this belt embodies that bold scene and gyaru energy, blending luxurious gold with a touch of vintage 2000s glam. Whether you’re rocking a casual look or going all out with a statement outfit, this studded gold belt adds the perfect touch of elegance and edge. Shine bright and showcase your McBling style!
